nasb.text: Manoah said to the angel of the Lord, “What is your name, so that when your words come to pass, we may honor you?”

esv.text: And Manoah said to the angel of the Lord, “What is your name, so that, when your words come true, we may honor you?”

cnv.text: 瑪挪亞問耶和華的使者：“你叫甚麼名字？到你的話應驗的時候，我們好把尊榮歸你。”

ccb.text: 玛挪亚说：“请告诉我你的名字，当一切应验的时候，我们好向你表达敬意。”
